title: crunchy chilli fujian fermented scallions cantonese pancake
description: a romantic chinese dish from fujian, featuring fermented scallions, chilli powder, and a crispy pancake.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a high-protein flour for a more tender pancake

ingredients.name: fermented scallions
ingredients.notes: use a store-bought or homemade version

instructions: in a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, water, and fermented scallions. Mix until a smooth batter forms.
cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let the batter rest for 30 minutes.
heat a non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
add 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and swirl it around to coat the pan.
using a ladle, pour 1/4 cup of the batter into the pan and tilt the pan to evenly coat the bottom.
sprinkle a few slices of scallion and a pinch of chilli powder on top of the batter.
when the edges start to curl and the surface is dry, use a spatula to loosen the pancake from the pan.
flip the pancake over and cook for another 30 seconds. Repeat with the remaining batter.
serve the pancakes hot with a drizzle of sesame oil and a sprinkle of scallions.
if desired, add a few drops of cornstarch to thicken the pancake before serving.
